Vendored frontend dependencies for PocketLog.

PocketLog ships all third-party assets from its own origin (no CDNs,
no tracking — see CLAUDE.md §Drittanbieter & Privacy). This file
documents where each file in this directory came from, so its identity
and integrity can be verified at any time without trusting the build
machine.

Verify locally with: sha256sum -c SOURCES.txt --ignore-missing


chart.umd.min.js
----------------
- Library:  Chart.js
- Version:  4.4.1
- License:  MIT (see banner at the top of the file)
- Source:   https://github.com/chartjs/Chart.js/releases/tag/v4.4.1
            npm tarball: https://registry.npmjs.org/chart.js/-/chart.js-4.4.1.tgz
            file inside tarball: package/dist/chart.umd.js.min  (the minified UMD bundle)
- Modifications: trailing `//# sourceMappingURL=chart.umd.js.map` removed
                 because the .map file is not shipped (would 404 in devtools)
- SHA256:   0ee28337f25838a7a5d6b1e8b2b02279ab10e80e17c217a99893a7a717f2ba05
            (after the sourceMappingURL strip — pristine npm bundle has a
             different hash)

0ee28337f25838a7a5d6b1e8b2b02279ab10e80e17c217a99893a7a717f2ba05  chart.umd.min.js
